description: A designed promotional graphic for the USCIS Alien Registration Requirement tool, identical to the agency's other ARR card. Pale blue background. Top text in dark/medium blue reads 'The Alien Registration Requirement Determination Tool will help you determine if you need to register.' (with 'Alien Registration Requirement Determination Tool' bolded). Below is a flat-line illustration of a browser window with three dots in its top bar and the DHS seal plus 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' wordmark in its corner; inside are three interlocking red gear icons. Beneath sits the program logo: a large blue 'ARR' monogram with a red swoosh, captioned 'Alien Registration Requirement.' Clean flat-icon government style. Messaging directs noncitizens/visitors to use the online tool to determine whether they must register. Tweet targets visitors to the U.S.
notable_text: The Alien Registration Requirement Determination Tool will help you determine if you need to register. ARR - Alien Registration Requirement
